name: Camp4 Therapeutics Corp
business: Camp4 Therapeutics Corp is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company pioneering RNA-targeting therapeutics to upregulate gene expression for treating genetic diseases. Its lead product candidate, CMP-002, targets SYNGAP1-related disorder, a severe developmental and epileptic encephalopathy caused by haploinsufficiency of the SYNGAP1 gene.
sellsTo: Patients with rare haploinsufficient central nervous system diseases

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company pioneering the discovery and development of a new class of RNA-targeting therapeutics with the goal of upregulating gene expression and restoring healthy protein levels to treat a broad range of genetic diseases.

catalysts.event: Initiation of global Phase 1/2 clinical trial for CMP-002
catalysts.sentence: We have initiated Good Laboratory Practice (GLP) toxicology studies for CMP-002 to support clinical trial applications and, pending successful completion and regulatory clearance, we intend to initiate a global Phase 1/2 clinical trial in individuals with SYNGAP1 as early as the second half of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 21,000 individuals living with SYNGAP1 in the United States and the five largest European markets.
tamClaims.sentence: While we believe that it remains underdiagnosed, we estimate that there are approximately 21,000 individuals living with SYNGAP1 in the United States and the five largest European markets.
